tweets.text:
Staying SAFE this winter includes protecting your home and family from potential disasters.  

@Readygov Safety Tip: if you’re using natural gas to keep your home warm, have a carbon monoxide detector and replace the batteries annually. If there is a leak, get out immediately and call 911. Find more readiness tips here: https://t.co/bJXufgim9z
tweets.text_resolved:
Staying SAFE this winter includes protecting your home and family from potential disasters.  

@Readygov Safety Tip: if you’re using natural gas to keep your home warm, have a carbon monoxide detector and replace the batteries annually. If there is a leak, get out immediately and call 911. Find more readiness tips here: https://www.ready.gov/winter-ready

media.alt_text: Illustration promoting natural gas safety by Ready, featuring a house layout with instructions on handling gas leaks, including shutting off the gas valve and calling 911. Icons emphasize installing carbon monoxide detectors and moving outdoors immediately if a leak is detected. Includes the hashtag #WinterReady.

tweets.text:
Heating your home this winter? Don't forget these safety tips: 
1️⃣ Keep flammable items at least 3 feet away from heat sources.
2️⃣ Never leave a fire unattended.
3️⃣ Test smoke alarms monthly. 

Stay safe and #WinterReady with more @Readygov tips: https://t.co/QwgDOhRVcA https://t.co/KmxTzgJtXR

tweets.text:
In her first week, @Sec_Noem joined an ICE enforcement operation, revoked Biden's extension of Venezuelan Temporary Protected Status, ceased funding to NGOs who facilitate illegal immigration, met with Coast Guard officials at the DCA crash site, and visited the northern border.  

Now, she's kicking off week two at the southern border.
tweets.text_resolved:
In her first week, @Sec_Noem joined an ICE enforcement operation, revoked Biden's extension of Venezuelan Temporary Protected Status, ceased funding to NGOs who facilitate illegal immigration, met with Coast Guard officials at the DCA crash site, and visited the northern border.  

Now, she's kicking off week two at the southern border.
